name: Venice Security
oneliner: Adaptive privileged access management platform for the AI era — unified identity governance across human, machine, and AI agent identities in enterprise environments.
finserv: Fortune 500 customers in finance explicitly confirmed; displacing CyberArk at F500 banking and insurance firms. Emerged from stealth Feb 2026 with live production deployments.
team: Rotem Lurie (CEO, Forbes 30 Under 30, ex-Axis Security Head of Product); Or Vaknin (CTO, Transmit Security + Flow Security). Wiz founders (Assaf Rappaport) as angels. Backed by IVP + Index Ventures.
thesis: Venice is the most finserv-validated agent identity company seen yet at Series A — Fortune 500 finance clients already displacing CyberArk, founded by ex-Axis Security veterans with Wiz founders as angels, running the same playbook that turned Wiz into a $32B exit.
evidence: Venice Security Launches with $33M to Redefine PAM
